title: Login with valid credentials lands on dashboard
description: Verifies a user can sign in with email and password and reach the authenticated app shell dashboard.

title: Login with incorrect password shows invalid credentials error
description: Verifies invalid credentials display an authentication error and user remains unauthenticated.

steps.description: Fill an incorrect password into the password field
Verify an invalid credentials error message is visible

title: Forgot password request shows recovery email sent confirmation
description: Verifies submitting a password recovery request provides a success confirmation in the UI.

steps.description: Verify a confirmation that recovery instructions were sent is visible

title: Reset password page accepts a new password and confirms reset
description: Verifies the reset password page allows entering a new password and shows a completion confirmation.

steps.description: Fill a valid new password into the new password field
Verify a password reset confirmation is visible

title: Login form blocks submission when email is missing
description: Verifies the login form prevents submission and shows validation when required email is not provided.

steps.description: Verify an email validation error is visible

title: Login form blocks submission when password is missing
description: Verifies the login form prevents submission and shows validation when required password is not provided.

steps.description: Verify a password validation error is visible

title: Sign up creates a new account and shows success confirmation
description: Verifies switching to sign up mode and submitting valid details shows a success confirmation and enters the app.

steps.description: Fill Test User Signup into the full name field
Fill a unique email into the email field
Fill a valid password with at least 6 characters into the password field
Verify a sign up success confirmation is visible

title: Sign up enforces minimum password length
description: Verifies the sign up form shows validation when password is shorter than the minimum length.

steps.description: Fill Test User Short Password into the full name field
Fill a unique email into the email field
Fill a password shorter than 6 characters into the password field
Verify a password length validation error is visible

title: Sign up blocks submission when full name is missing
description: Verifies the sign up form requires a full name and shows validation when it is not provided.

steps.description: Fill a unique email into the email field
Fill a valid password with at least 6 characters into the password field
Verify a full name validation error is visible

title: Sign up blocks submission when email is missing
description: Verifies the sign up form requires an email and shows validation when it is not provided.

steps.description: Fill Test User Missing Email into the full name field
Fill a valid password with at least 6 characters into the password field
Verify an email validation error is visible

title: Dashboard loads with KPIs and charts visible
description: Verifies the main dashboard renders key KPI cards and charts after login.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}

Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click a quick navigation card that opens the patients module
Verify the patient list view is displayed

title: Patients module shows list and supports searching
description: Verifies the patients module loads and filtering via search updates the list.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill "Auto Patient" into the patient search field
Verify the patient list is displayed

title: Create a new patient and verify it appears in the list
description: Creates a patient through the form and confirms the new record shows in the list.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill "Auto Patient 001" into the name field
Fill a valid phone number into the phone field
Fill a valid CPF into the CPF field
Select a valid birth date in the birth date field
Fill "Rua Teste 123" into the address field
Fill "Paciente criado por teste" into the notes field
Fill "Auto Patient 001" into the patient search field
Verify "Auto Patient 001" appears in the patient list

title: Patient form shows validation errors when required fields are missing
description: Attempts to submit the create patient form without required data and verifies validation feedback is shown.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify field validation errors are visible
Verify the user remains on the patient form

Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill "Auto Patient 002" into the name field
Fill a valid phone number into the phone field
Fill "Auto Patient 002" into the patient search field
Open the patient details for "Auto Patient 002"

title: Delete a patient and verify it is removed from the list
